decisions.rationale: PROC-02/03/04/05 delivered via row-locked atomic goods-receipt transaction and three-state PO detail page; end-to-end lifecycle checkpoint approved per STATE.md

next_action: Run the 5 interactive UAT tests in .planning/phases/04-procurement/04-UAT.md against the running app (Docker postgres + npm run dev), record pass/fail for each, then re-run /gsd-verify-work or update 04-UAT.md status to close out Phase 04
context_notes: Phase 04 (procurement) is code-complete and its own automated verification (tsc, vitest, code review fixes CR-01/02, WR-01/03/04/05/06/07/08) all pass. What's left is purely human interactive UAT (5 scenarios in 04-UAT.md, all still 'pending') plus a small side quest: a quick task fixed two recurring Base UI console warnings app-wide (nativeButton + uncontrolled Select), verified by grep/tsc/vitest, with the one deferred manual browser check partially covered by a follow-up SSR/hydrate regression test (88e24bc). Local branch is 43 commits ahead of origin/main and has never been pushed. Nothing is currently broken or blocked technically — this is purely a 'go run the manual checks and commit the loose files' resume point.
